EXERCISE / MODULE 6 / LESSON 2: SCRIPTING YOUR WEBINAR
SCRIPTING YOUR WEBINAR
The best way to know what to say at each point in your webinar is to use a
base script.
At minimum, we suggest you consider scripting:
✓ 	The Introduction
✓ 	The Pivot
✓ 	The Second-Level Benefits
✓ 	The Features
✓ 	The ‘Show the URL’ (where you ask for the order)
✓ 	Response to Key Objections
✓ 	The Emotional Close
In addition, you may want to consider scripting:
✓ 	Price Anchor and Price Reveal
✓ 	Benefits
✓ 	“This is Right for You If”
Use the space below to script or create bullet points for what you will say for
the key segments of your webinar (see Modules 4 and 5 for what to include).
The Introduction
